name: Get Zip Performance for OOH - Billboards

content.query:
select 
zipPerfForOOH.*
,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Branch, Product ORDER BY [Net Sales Amount] DESC) AS [Net Sales Rank]
,RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Division, Branch, Product ORDER BY [3Mo Net Sales Amount] DESC) AS [3Mo Net Sales Rank]
from
(
SELECT
zipPerf.Division
,brn.LongName as Branch
,prd.LongDescription as Product
,zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zip.HouseholdsPerZipCode as [Total Households]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28' then NetSalesAmount else 0 end) as [3Mo Net Sales Amount]
,sum([NetSalesAmount]) as [Net Sales Amount]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Overall RRI]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Baths RRI]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index] as [Windows RRI]
,sum([LeadCount]) as [Lead Count]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28' then LeadCount else 0 end) as [3Mo Lead Count]
,sum([ApptSet]) as [Appt Set]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28' then ApptSet else 0 end) as [3Mo Appt Set]
,sum([NetSold]) as [Net Sold]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2022-12-01' and '2023-02-28' then NetSold else 0 end) as [3Mo Net Sold]
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE] zipPerf
 inner join ODS.MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS zip
 on zipPerf.ZipCode = zip.ZipCode
 inner join EDW.DIM_BRANCH brn
 on zipPerf.BranchID = brn.BranchID
 inner join EDW.DIM_PRODUCT prd
 on zipPerf.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join ODS.MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX zonda
on zipPerf.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
where 
zip.PrimaryRecord = 'P'
group by 
zipPerf.Division
,brn.LongName
,prd.LongDescription
,zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zip.HouseholdsPerZipCode
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
) zipPerfForOOH
order BY
Division, Branch, Product, [Net Sales Rank], [3Mo Net Sales Rank]
